disclosure_items.clinical_fact: A minor cut to the sole of the right foot two weeks ago has failed to heal and over the last 48 hours has become red, swollen and is leaking pus
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the foot — what does it look like now?
When did the wound start and how has it changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I got a little cut on the bottom of my foot about two weeks ago and it just never healed. In the last day or two it's gone red and swollen and now it's leaking pus.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound, persistent generalised fatigue over recent months, limiting ability to work
trigger_question_examples: You mentioned exhaustion — how long has that been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm shattered all the time. It's been building up for months and I can barely get through a work day.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Increased thirst and increased frequency/volume of urination developing insidiously over about six months
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in how much you're drinking or passing urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, I've been really thirsty for months and I'm up weeing all the time, day and night. I just put it down to getting older.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive blurring of vision in both eyes
trigger_question_examples: Have your eyes been affected at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My eyesight has gone blurry in both eyes over the last little while — everything's a bit fuzzy.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symmetrical numbness and tingling in both feet in a stocking distribution
trigger_question_examples: Do your feet feel numb or have pins and needles?
Can you feel your feet normally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Both my feet have been numb and tingly for a while, like I've got thick socks on. That's probably why I didn't even feel the cut when it happened.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Never previously diagnosed with diabetes or any chronic illness; takes no regular medications
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any medical conditions?
Are you on any regular medicines?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I've never really been told I've got anything wrong with me and I don't take any tablets. I don't go to the doctor much.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feeling generally unwell and possibly feverish, but no shaking chills; no spreading of the redness up the leg reported at this point
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers, sweats or shaking chills?
Is the redness spreading up your leg or ankle?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel a bit hot and run down but I haven't had proper shaking chills, and the redness seems to be just around the sore so far, not up my leg.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Habitually wears tight-fitting footwear and works on his feet
trigger_question_examples: What sort of shoes do you usually wear?
Are you on your feet a lot at work?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm on my feet all day for work and my shoes are pretty tight — I never thought much of it.
